This document is created during NADE's transition to electronic formatted documents for all chapter & regional Constitution & Bylaws.

North Dakota has a designated 'chapter' number. I am currently the NADE National Constitution & Bylaws chair, and I confirm that there are no constitution & bylaws on file, in paper form or other, for this chapter. This chapter does contain a few members at this time.

Donnie Hayes, NADE National Constitution & Bylaws Chairperson (9/09 to 9/10)
